backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing inventory management (ingredients), recipe management (salad bowls), customer management, and session-based authentication with CRUD operations for all entities.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that adds customer management functionality (nextCustomerId and customers Map) to existing actor state while preserving ingredients, recipes, and sessions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four completed customer management features: CustomersPage UI, CustomerForm component, CustomerList component, and React Query hooks integration.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, contexts, and utilities for the Salad Khatora inventory and customer management application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for the application's design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Salad Khatora React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring React Query, TanStack Router with routes for all pages (login, dashboard, inventory, menu, sales, subscriptions, customers), theme provider, and authentication context.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Form component for adding/editing customers with fields for name, mobile (10-digit validation), email, reference source, preferences, and address; stores contact info as JSON string and uses react-hook-form with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CustomerList.tsx: Displays a grid of customer cards with contact information (phone, email, address), active status badges, and edit functionality. Parses JSON contact info and shows empty state when no customers exist.
frontend/src/components/IngredientForm.t: Form component for adding/editing ingredients with fields for name, quantity, unit (grams/kilograms), cost price, supplier, and low stock threshold. Uses react-hook-form and mutations to save data.
frontend/src/components/IngredientList.t: Displays a grid of ingredient cards showing quantity, cost price, supplier, and threshold with low stock warnings. Provides edit functionality and empty state message.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout with sticky header, navigation menu (desktop and mobile), notification bell with unread count, and logout button. Handles authentication checks and loading states.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: Popover component displaying notifications with icons for low-stock and calendar events, mark-as-read and dismiss actions, and scrollable list with read/unread states.
frontend/src/components/RecipeForm.tsx: Form for creating/editing recipes with name, bowl size selection (small/medium/large), and dynamic ingredient list with quantities. Uses field arrays for managing multiple ingredients.
frontend/src/components/RecipeList.tsx: Displays a grid of recipe cards with bowl size badges, ingredient lists, and edit buttons. Maps ingredient IDs to names and formats bowl sizes (small/medium/large) to gram weights.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides authentication context managing Internet Identity login/logout, session creation/destruction, and persists session IDs to localStorage. Exposes authentication state and methods to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance using React Query, switching between anonymous and authenticated actors based on identity. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication via a React context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login flow, identity persistence, and delegation validation. Includes provider component and status tracking for login states.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Manages notifications for low-stock ingredients, persisting them to localStorage. Generates notifications when low-stock items are detected and provides methods to mark as read or dismiss.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating ingredients, recipes, and customers via the backend actor. All mutations invalidate relevant query caches and require authentication via sessionId.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including colors for primary, secondary, destructive, and chart elements using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Customer management page displaying total and active customer counts, a customer list, and a dialog for adding/editing customers. Handles customer selection and form dialog state.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying inventory overview with cards for total value, ingredient count, low stock alerts, and placeholder for sales data. Shows welcome message and low stock warnings.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with ingredient list, add/edit dialog, CSV export functionality, and total inventory value display. Handles ingredient CRUD operations.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication button, branded with Salad Khatora logo and green theme. Redirects authenticated users to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Menu management page for recipes with add/edit dialog and recipe list display. Handles recipe CRUD operations through RecipeForm and RecipeList components.
frontend/src/pages/SalesPage.tsx: Placeholder page for sales and billing functionality with 'coming soon' message indicating future invoice creation and inventory deduction features.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Placeholder page for subscription management with 'coming soon' message for weekly and monthly meal plan features.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility function to export data arrays to CSV files with proper escaping, header generation, and automatic filename with timestamp.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, container settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a salad business management system with inventory, menu, billing, subscriptions, and authentication features. Notes a known issue with customer management form.
